issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'at the bottom of the owner's deck'. Should be a custom action or 'ReturnToDeck' with placement specification, not 'ReturnToHand'.
Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'at the bottom of the owner's deck'. Should be a custom action or 'ReturnToDeck' with placement specification, not 'ReturnToHand'.
Target logic is incorrect. Should select up to 1 character with cost ≤2, not use maxCost constraint alone. Needs proper cost filtering.
Target logic is incorrect. Should select up to 1 character with cost ≤1, but the two selections are independent choices, not sequential filtering from the same pool.
